name: Camera FOV Coverage Optimization
description: An industrial automation engineer is designing a visual inspection cell. Using the ZMQ Remote API, write a Python script to optimize the mounting of an overhead vision sensor to maximize visibility of a 3x3 grid of target spheres spread over a 2x2m area on the floor. The script must sweep the camera's Z position through at least 4 heights (between 1.0m and 4.0m) and its pitch angle through at least 4 angles (between 0 and 45 degrees). For each of the 16+ candidate poses, update the simulation and record how many of the 9 targets are visible. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/ including camera_coverage_sweep.csv (columns: pose_id, z_m, pitch_deg, visible_count), optimal_camera_placement.json (fields: total_poses_tested, max_visible_count, optimal_z_m, optimal_pitch_deg), the Python script as coverage_script.py, and the CoppeliaSim scene as optimized_scene.ttt. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
